content:
Character: Marta Kovacs
Perception: I've seen her in the coffee shop — heavy-set woman, dark hair pulled tight, always hunched over a laptop doing design work. She has beautiful hands, the kind that make you look twice. She moves like she's trying to disappear, which is a shame because her work is extraordinary — I glanced at her screen once and the typography had real authority. We've exchanged maybe ten words total. She probably doesn't register me at all. I see her as someone whose talent far exceeds her confidence. I know she lives on the third floor and freelances from home.
